findings.evidence_static: File: C:\xampp\htdocs\dvwa\login.php, Line: 20, Code: requires login
findings.evidence_dynamic: DB error: 'you have an error in your sql syntax'
findings.remediation: Use prepared statements with parameterized queries. Never concatenate user input into SQL strings. See: https://owasp.org/www-community/attacks/SQL_Injection
Never pass user input to OS command functions. Use escapeshellarg() if shell calls are unavoidable. See: https://owasp.org/www-community/attacks/Command_Injection
Validate file paths against a whitelist of allowed values. Use realpath() and verify the result stays within bounds. See: https://owasp.org/www-community/attacks/Path_Traversal

findings.evidence_dynamic: Payload reflected unencoded in response body
findings.remediation: Encode all user input before rendering in HTML. Use htmlspecialchars() in PHP or equivalent. See: https://owasp.org/www-community/attacks/xss/
